messages.content: I’d like to exchange it for the same shirt, but one size smaller. Also, if you have it in black, I’d prefer that color instead of red. But if black isn’t available, I’ll just stick with red. The cotton material is perfect, so please keep that the same.

messages.content: So style should remain crew neck

messages.content: Yes, please keep the crew neck style. I just want it smaller and, if possible, in black. Otherwise, red is fine.
